message:
docs(syscall): add safety documentation to unsafe syscall wrappers

Add `# Safety` sections to unsafe functions in syscall/mod.rs to
satisfy clippy::missing_safety_doc lint. Documents pointer validity
requirements for each syscall wrapper.

Also includes pthread_abi improvements and conformance profile sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -188,7 +188,7 @@
         "note": "Spawn-attribute signal-set roundtrips now use signal_abi helpers, and the closefrom fallback uses unistd_abi::sysconf."
       },
       "pthread_abi": {
-        "count": 18,
+        "count": 17,
         "functions": [
           "pthread_cond_broadcast_fn",
           "pthread_cond_destroy_fn",
@@ -201,7 +201,6 @@
           "pthread_mutex_lock_fn",
           "pthread_mutex_trylock_fn",
           "pthread_mutex_unlock_fn",
-          "pthread_self_raw",
           "pthread_create_raw",
           "pthread_create_with_managed_attr",
           "pthread_detach_raw",
@@ -248,7 +247,7 @@
         "note": "Legacy regex register allocation now uses the ABI allocator path instead of direct libc calloc/free."
       }
     },
-    "total_call_throughs": 18,
+    "total_call_throughs": 17,
     "note": "Census tracks direct host call-through scan patterns used by scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh."
   }
 }
